wizard.name: AZ2 ImpatientImpulse Edition
wizard.author: impatientimpulse
wizard.description: Netflix-style Kodi build. Dark theme, Trakt rows, TMDb metadata, April 2026 trending content. Based on Arctic Zephyr 2 Resurrection.

build.name: AZ2 ImpatientImpulse Edition – Full Build
build.description: Complete Netflix-style build: skin + TMDb Helper + Trakt + all widget sources pre-configured. Just add your TMDb API key and authorize Trakt.
build.postinstall: AZ2 ImpatientImpulse Edition installed! Next steps: 1. Add-ons → TMDb Helper → Settings → paste your TMDb API key 2. Add-ons → Trakt → Authorize → visit trakt.tv/activate 3. Restart Kodi to load all rows

addon.name: The Movie Database Helper
addon.description: Required for all metadata, fanart, and widget rows. Get your free API key at themoviedb.org/settings/api

addon.name: Trakt
addon.description: Required for Continue Watching and My Watchlist rows. Scrobbles your watch history automatically.

addon.name: Skin Shortcuts
addon.description: Optional: lets you customize the navigation menu items.

option.name: Clear TMDb Cache
option.description: Clears TMDb Helper artwork and metadata cache. Run if images look wrong.

option.name: Force Trakt Sync
option.description: Forces a full Trakt sync. Run if Continue Watching row is out of date.

option.name: Reload Skin
option.description: Reloads the AZ2 ImpatientImpulse skin without restarting Kodi.

option.name: Clear Kodi Cache
option.description: Clears Kodi's thumbnail and package cache. Frees up storage, especially useful on Fire Stick.

wizard.changelog: v1.0.0 – May 2026 - Initial public release - Netflix dark skin (AZ2 ImpatientImpulse Edition) - 8 pre-configured content rows - Trakt in-progress / watchlist integration - TMDb Helper metadata + fanart - April 2026 curated trending content - Hero banner with clearlogo overlay - Red progress bars on Continue Watching - Top 10 rank number overlay row - Video info dialog (More Info panel)
